def negative_mixed_mutation_and_query_methods_share_same_manager_class():
    rule_id = "mixed_mutation_and_query_methods_share_same_manager_class"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag manager-style classes that both mutate and answer read-model queries with no boundary."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
